name: vp_sentiment_scan
description: Lightweight VP token sentiment analysis. Returns FinBERT scores from 6 crypto news sources (CoinDesk, CoinTelegraph, The Block, Decrypt, Blockworks, DLNews), Fear & Greed index, BTC 3-tier trend (24h/30d/180d), and VP-specific keyword detection. Fast and cheap — designed for agents needing sentiment input without full market analysis.

symbol.description: VP token to scan sentiment for

include_headlines.description: Include top news headlines in response
